stories.headline: Trump Says U.S. Will Help Stranded Ships Leave Strait of Hormuz

stories.headline: Guyana President Warns of Mineral ‘Dependence’ as Iran War Speeds Shift From Oil
stories.summary: Guyana President Irfaan Ali warned that shifting too quickly to renewable energy in the wake of the Strait of Hormuz oil crisis could create a new dependence on critical minerals such as lithium, copper and cobalt.

stories.headline: Iran threatens retaliation after Trump says U.S. will guide ships in Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: The president left unclear what measures the U.S. would take and whether any forces would be at risk. Iran said it would strike any foreign force approaching the strait.

stories.headline: U.S. Warns China Over Iranian Oil as Sanctions Fight Intensifies
stories.summary: China told its independent refineries to disregard U.S. sanctions over their purchases of Iranian crude.

stories.headline: Armenia tests Moscow’s patience with Zelenskyy visit and EU leaders’ summit
stories.summary: One month before the highly anticipated parliamentary elections, Armenia’s Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan set out the country’s foreign policy trajectory with striking clarity, hosting European leaders, the NATO secretary general, and even Ukraine’s president.

stories.headline: Three Russian diplomats expelled from Austria over spying accusations
stories.summary: They gathered information using a "forest of antennas" installed on top of diplomatic buildings, the foreign minister says.

stories.headline: Israeli attacks kill dozens within days in Lebanon despite ceasefire

stories.headline: Fed’s Williams Sees Rates Well Positioned Amid Iran War Uncertainty

stories.headline: Fed’s Williams Says Rates Well Positioned Amid War Uncertainty
stories.summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said the US central bank’s current stance balances risks to price stability and full employment amid “notable” supply-chain disruptions from the Iran war.

stories.headline: Inside the First Berkshire Shareholder Meeting With Greg Abel as CEO
stories.summary: Greg Abel lead the Berkshire Hathaway Inc. shareholders meeting on Saturday for the first time as CEO. It was very different compared to when Warren Buffett ran the program.
